description_long: This is a modern flat-screen television with a wide, rectangular display and a slim profile. The front features a large, glossy screen surrounded by a thin, black bezel, and the television stands on two angled legs that provide stability. The back is plain and matte, with no visible branding or ports, emphasizing a minimalist design. The side views reveal the extremely thin depth of the television, highlighting its contemporary, space-saving construction. The legs are splayed outward and appear to be made of metal or sturdy plastic, supporting the television securely. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, suitable for both residential and commercial urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern flat-screen television with a thin black bezel, wide display, and angled support legs. Its minimalist design and slim profile make it ideal for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, glossy screen with a thin black bezel and angled support legs.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the extremely slim profile and the splayed design of the support legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, matte back with no visible branding, ports, or buttons.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the ultra-thin depth and the leg structure.
attribute_bezel_design: Thin black bezel, matte finish, minimalistic styling
